{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Brand & Marketing Manager",
  "description": "So Fresh is a healthy food company with operations across Nigeria. At So Fresh, we believe food should be fresh and close to nature as much as possible; hence, we create tasty, fresh, delicious, healthy food options.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand &amp; Marketing Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Opebi, Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Level: Mid-level Management
Reports to: Managing Director
Working Days &amp; Hours: Monday &ndash; Friday 8 am &ndash; 5 pm, with 1-day remote work

Role Summary


	Developing and executing the overall brand and marketing strategy
	Managing brand identity, guidelines, and consistency across all channels
	Overseeing campaign planning, budget management, and ROI tracking
	Leading and mentoring the marketing team (Digital Marketing Officer and Social Media Officer)
	Collaborating with sales and operations to align marketing efforts with business goals
	Reporting on marketing performance to senior leadership.


Job Responsibilities
Marketing Strategy:


	Create marketing strategies to build customer loyalty, brand recognition, increased store footfall and customer satisfaction aimed at driving growth and achieving sales targets
	Lead the development and execution of offline marketing initiatives, including end-to-end activations, campaigns, product launch, and outlet launch to drive awareness, market penetration and customer growth
	Actively collaborate with all internal stakeholders to achieve campaign targets.


Digital Strategy:


	Develop and execute an annual Digital Marketing Plan in line with So Fresh strategic objectives and initiatives
	Drive measurable, ROI-focused results by planning and optimizing paid digital campaigns
	Ensure all content deliverables are in line with So Fresh digital brand strategy, brand guide and personality
	Manage the company website to drive visibility, sales, and growth.


PR &amp; Corporate Image Building:


	Create and implement PR strategies and initiatives to promote a positive company image and identify opportunities for positive brand messaging
	Monitor public perception, opinions and mentions of the So Fresh brand and amplify the positive sentiments and tactfully counter negative publicity and crisis management
	Produce high quality press releases, newsletter, media kit and related marketing materials that amplify the So Fresh story and build connection with the public and the media.


Business Cycle Management:


	Develop and implement marketing strategies and campaigns in line with company&rsquo;s established business cycle
	Manage the entire process from idea generation to execution, to drive brand awareness, tell the company story and achieve sales target.


Team Leadership &amp; Development:


	Lead and manage the marketing department to exceed targets
	Recruit and train the marketing team to ensure their effectiveness and continuous improvement
	Align the marketing team activities with company goals and objectives.


Analytics &amp; Reporting:


	Prepare periodic reports on marketing performance to the management
	Create monthly reports on the performance of digital marketing activities against set performance metrics
	Draw meaningful conclusions from activation/campaign data and identify potential opportunities for growth and improvement
	Tracking and reporting on campaign performance, ROAS, and conversion metrics
	Forecast marketing campaign growth and return on investment.


Qualification &amp; Requirements


	BSc. Degree / BA in marketing, communications, or a relevant field
	7 years plus of cognate experience in Digital Marketing &amp; Brand Management
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a management capacity
	Proven experience in performance marketing
	Marketing experience in retail, food, and related sectors is an added advantage
	Excellent understanding of digital marketing concepts and best practices
	In-depth understanding of Inbound, Outbound, and Influencer marketing
	Experience with B2C, social media, Google AdWords, Keyword Planner, email marketing, and SEO/SEM
	Practical knowledge of analytics tools and the ability to set up tracking/reporting mechanisms to capture key business metrics
	Proficiency with design tools, e.g., Canva, Photoshop, Adobe, Inshot, Figma, etc
	Demonstrated communication skills in liaising with internal and external stakeholders.


Remuneration


	Salary: N750,000 monthly.
	Benefits: Health Insurance, Pension, etc.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-14",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "So Fresh"
    
  },

Brand & Marketing Manager Job at So Fresh




        
    

        
        So Fresh is a healthy food company with operations across Nigeria. At So Fresh, we believe food should be fresh and close to nature as much as possible; hence, we create tasty, fresh, delicious, healthy food options.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand & Marketing Manager

Job Location: Opebi, Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Level: Mid-level Management
Reports to: Managing Director
Working Days & Hours: Monday – Friday 8 am – 5 pm, with 1-day remote work

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Developing and executing the overall brand and marketing strategy
	Managing brand identity, guidelines, and consistency across all channels
	Overseeing campaign planning, budget management, and ROI tracking
	Leading and mentoring the marketing team (Digital Marketing Officer and Social Media Officer)
	Collaborating with sales and operations to align marketing efforts with business goals
	Reporting on marketing performance to senior leadership.


Job Responsibilities
Marketing Strategy:


	Create marketing strategies to build customer loyalty, brand recognition, increased store footfall and customer satisfaction aimed at driving growth and achieving sales targets
	Lead the development and execution of offline marketing initiatives, including end-to-end activations, campaigns, product launch, and outlet launch to drive awareness, market penetration and customer growth
	Actively collaborate with all internal stakeholders to achieve campaign targets.


Digital Strategy:


	Develop and execute an annual Digital Marketing Plan in line with So Fresh strategic objectives and initiatives
	Drive measurable, ROI-focused results by planning and optimizing paid digital campaigns
	Ensure all content deliverables are in line with So Fresh digital brand strategy, brand guide and personality
	Manage the company website to drive visibility, sales, and growth.


PR & Corporate Image Building:


	Create and implement PR strategies and initiatives to promote a positive company image and identify opportunities for positive brand messaging
	Monitor public perception, opinions and mentions of the So Fresh brand and amplify the positive sentiments and tactfully counter negative publicity and crisis management
	Produce high quality press releases, newsletter, media kit and related marketing materials that amplify the So Fresh story and build connection with the public and the media.


Business Cycle Management:


	Develop and implement marketing strategies and campaigns in line with company’s established business cycle
	Manage the entire process from idea generation to execution, to drive brand awareness, tell the company story and achieve sales target.


Team Leadership & Development:


	Lead and manage the marketing department to exceed targets
	Recruit and train the marketing team to ensure their effectiveness and continuous improvement
	Align the marketing team activities with company goals and objectives.


Analytics & Reporting:


	Prepare periodic reports on marketing performance to the management
	Create monthly reports on the performance of digital marketing activities against set performance metrics
	Draw meaningful conclusions from activation/campaign data and identify potential opportunities for growth and improvement
	Tracking and reporting on campaign performance, ROAS, and conversion metrics
	Forecast marketing campaign growth and return on investment.


Qualification & Requirements


	BSc. Degree / BA in marketing, communications, or a relevant field
	7 years plus of cognate experience in Digital Marketing & Brand Management
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a management capacity
	Proven experience in performance marketing
	Marketing experience in retail, food, and related sectors is an added advantage
	Excellent understanding of digital marketing concepts and best practices
	In-depth understanding of Inbound, Outbound, and Influencer marketing
	Experience with B2C, social media, Google AdWords, Keyword Planner, email marketing, and SEO/SEM
	Practical knowledge of analytics tools and the ability to set up tracking/reporting mechanisms to capture key business metrics
	Proficiency with design tools, e.g., Canva, Photoshop, Adobe, Inshot, Figma, etc
	Demonstrated communication skills in liaising with internal and external stakeholders.


Remuneration


	Salary: N750,000 monthly.
	Benefits: Health Insurance, Pension, etc.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Branding Executive (Out-of-Home Branding & Brand Visibility)",
  "description": "Lucky Fibres Limited started out making Nobel Carpets and rugs but pivoted into premium hair extensions by introducing Lush Hair in 2017. Since then, Lush Hair has become Increasingly Popular with consumers for its high quality and trendy styles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branding Executive (Out-of-Home Branding &amp; Brand Visibility)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Branding Executive leads and executes the company&rsquo;s Out-of-Home (OOH) branding strategy to ensure strong visibility in high-traffic locations.
	The role focuses on planning, supervising, and maintaining outdoor brand assets while managing vendors and ensuring high-quality, cost-effective installations aligned with brand standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan and execute Out-of-Home (OOH) branding campaigns across various outdoor channels.
	Identify and secure high-visibility, strategic branding locations.
	Ensure all branding materials meet brand identity and visual standards.
	Supervise installations and ensure quality, safety, and proper execution.
	Coordinate with vendors and production teams for timely delivery.
	Monitor and maintain all outdoor branding assets regularly.
	Conduct site inspections and visibility audits.
	Track performance and recommend improvements for better reach and impact.


What Success Looks Like


	Strong and consistent brand visibility in prime locations.
	High-quality and professionally executed outdoor branding.
	Cost-effective vendor negotiations and optimized spending.
	Well-maintained and visually appealing brand assets.
	Increased brand recognition and outdoor market dominance.


Requirements
Key Competencies:


	Strong ability to identify high-impact branding locations.
	Excellent negotiation skills for cost-effective deals.
	Effective coordination and project management skills.
	High attention to detail and quality control.
	Strong vendor and stakeholder relationship management.
	Good analytical skills to evaluate branding performance.
	Strong organizational and documentation skills.
	Deep understanding of brand identity and visual standards.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;lushlndnational@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Branding Executive (Out-of-Home Branding & Brand Visibility) Job at Lucky Fibres Limited




        
    

        
        Lucky Fibres Limited started out making Nobel Carpets and rugs but pivoted into premium hair extensions by introducing Lush Hair in 2017. Since then, Lush Hair has become Increasingly Popular with consumers for its high quality and trendy styles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branding Executive (Out-of-Home Branding & Brand Visibility)

Job Location: Lagos  
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Branding Executive leads and executes the company’s Out-of-Home (OOH) branding strategy to ensure strong visibility in high-traffic locations.
	The role focuses on planning, supervising, and maintaining outdoor brand assets while managing vendors and ensuring high-quality, cost-effective installations aligned with brand standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan and execute Out-of-Home (OOH) branding campaigns across various outdoor channels.
	Identify and secure high-visibility, strategic branding locations.
	Ensure all branding materials meet brand identity and visual standards.
	Supervise installations and ensure quality, safety, and proper execution.
	Coordinate with vendors and production teams for timely delivery.
	Monitor and maintain all outdoor branding assets regularly.
	Conduct site inspections and visibility audits.
	Track performance and recommend improvements for better reach and impact.


What Success Looks Like


	Strong and consistent brand visibility in prime locations.
	High-quality and professionally executed outdoor branding.
	Cost-effective vendor negotiations and optimized spending.
	Well-maintained and visually appealing brand assets.
	Increased brand recognition and outdoor market dominance.


Requirements
Key Competencies:


	Strong ability to identify high-impact branding locations.
	Excellent negotiation skills for cost-effective deals.
	Effective coordination and project management skills.
	High attention to detail and quality control.
	Strong vendor and stakeholder relationship management.
	Good analytical skills to evaluate branding performance.
	Strong organizational and documentation skills.
	Deep understanding of brand identity and visual standards.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

title: Admin Support Personnel Job at R & R Recruiting Services
content:
R & R Recruiting Services is a recruitment agency, training, Training, Consulting & Human Resources Management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Support Personnel

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Gender: Female

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Attend to walk-in customers and provide information about products and services.
	Assist customers with inquiries, order processing, and basic sales support.
	Maintain and update records of customer orders and transactions.
	Provide general administrative support, including filing, documentation, and office coordination.
	Ensure the front desk and office environment remains organized, welcoming, and professional.


Qualifications


	Minimum of a BSc or HND in any related field.


Requirement:


	Must be computer literate (especially in Microsoft Word and Excel).
	Good communication, persuasion, and organizational skills.


Salary
N120,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, via call: 07079804607.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Manager",
  "description": "Ericsson is a world-leading provider of telecommunications equipment &amp; services to mobile &amp; fixed network operators. Over 1,000 networks in more than 180 countries use Ericsson equipment, &amp; more than 40 percent of the world&#39;s mobile traffic passes through Ericsson networks. Using innovation to empower people, business &amp; society, we are working towards the Networked Society, in which everything that can benefit from a connection will have one. At Ericsson, we apply our innovation to market-based solutions that empower people &amp; society to help shape a more sustainable world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

Job Position:&nbsp;Account Manager

Job ID:&nbsp;782655
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos, Nigeria

About this Opportunity


	We are looking for a motivated and customer-focused Account Manager to join Ericsson. In this role, you will serve as the primary interface between Ericsson and our valued customers, building strong, long-term partnerships while driving sustainable business growth.
	You will leverage Ericsson&#39;s world-class portfolio &mdash; including RAN, Core Network, BSS/OSS, and Managed Services &mdash; to deliver tailored solutions that meet customer needs and exceed their expectations.
	This is a unique opportunity to play a pivotal role in shaping our customers&#39; digital transformation journeys while contributing directly to Ericsson&#39;s commercial success across your assigned accounts.


What you will do


	Own and manage end-to-end customer relationships as the primary point of contact for assigned accounts
	Develop, maintain, and execute strategic account plans aligned with both customer objectives and Ericsson&#39;s business strategy
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities within existing accounts to drive revenue growth
	Lead contract negotiations and ensure profitable deal closure in collaboration with internal stakeholders
	Lead and manage local contract signing for all Group deals and Proof of Concepts (POCs) with assigned accounts
	Interfacing with OpCo on a regular basis for ongoing and new opportunities
	Leading deals through close interface with the GCU team for PS Core, MS for PS Core, and upcoming Antenna and MW opportunities specific to Nigeria
	Work with domain teams for any support or technical issues requiring resolution, including services costing
	Account operations &ndash; manage deals up to date in Salesforce
	PO to SO Process, Secure LC waiver, credit block approval and alignment, and secure NOTAP and CCI approvals for Core SW, Early Starts etc
	Execute monthly customer governance for the Core and IN projects
	Manage ad-hoc commercial, technical, and contractual tasks related to the Airtel account
	Lead and coordinate as ACR for responses to RFPs on any new opportunities from other CSPs as assigned (Glo is following up for engagement with us)
	Monitor customer satisfaction and proactively address any concerns or escalations
	Represent Ericsson at customer meetings, industry forums, and business reviews


Requirements
The skills you bring:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business, Engineering, Telecommunications, or a related field
	Proven experience in account management, sales, or business development within the telecommunications or technology industry
	Strong commercial acumen with a track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	Excellent stakeholder management and relationship-building skills at senior levels
	Deep understanding of telecom products, solutions, and services &mdash; RAN, Core Network, BSS/OSS, and Managed Services is a strong advantage
	Familiarity with regulatory and compliance frameworks, including NOTAP, CCI, and LC processes in relevant markets
	Experience managing deals and pipelines through Salesforce or similar CRM platforms
	Strong negotiation, influencing, and presentation skills
	Collaborative mindset with the ability to coordinate and lead cross-functional teams
	Self-driven, results-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, matrix organization


Why join Ericsson?


	At Ericsson, you&acute;ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what&acute;s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world&rsquo;s toughest problems.
	You&acute;ll be challenged, but you won&rsquo;t be alone. You&acute;ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
",

Account Manager Job at Ericsson




        
    

        
        Ericsson is a world-leading provider of telecommunications equipment & services to mobile & fixed network operators. Over 1,000 networks in more than 180 countries use Ericsson equipment, & more than 40 percent of the world's mobile traffic passes through Ericsson networks. Using innovation to empower people, business & society, we are working towards the Networked Society, in which everything that can benefit from a connection will have one. At Ericsson, we apply our innovation to market-based solutions that empower people & society to help shape a more sustainable world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Account Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job ID: 782655
Job Location: Lagos, Nigeria

About this Opportunity


	We are looking for a motivated and customer-focused Account Manager to join Ericsson. In this role, you will serve as the primary interface between Ericsson and our valued customers, building strong, long-term partnerships while driving sustainable business growth.
	You will leverage Ericsson's world-class portfolio — including RAN, Core Network, BSS/OSS, and Managed Services — to deliver tailored solutions that meet customer needs and exceed their expectations.
	This is a unique opportunity to play a pivotal role in shaping our customers' digital transformation journeys while contributing directly to Ericsson's commercial success across your assigned accounts.


What you will do


	Own and manage end-to-end customer relationships as the primary point of contact for assigned accounts
	Develop, maintain, and execute strategic account plans aligned with both customer objectives and Ericsson's business strategy
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities within existing accounts to drive revenue growth
	Lead contract negotiations and ensure profitable deal closure in collaboration with internal stakeholders
	Lead and manage local contract signing for all Group deals and Proof of Concepts (POCs) with assigned accounts
	Interfacing with OpCo on a regular basis for ongoing and new opportunities
	Leading deals through close interface with the GCU team for PS Core, MS for PS Core, and upcoming Antenna and MW opportunities specific to Nigeria
	Work with domain teams for any support or technical issues requiring resolution, including services costing
	Account operations – manage deals up to date in Salesforce
	PO to SO Process, Secure LC waiver, credit block approval and alignment, and secure NOTAP and CCI approvals for Core SW, Early Starts etc
	Execute monthly customer governance for the Core and IN projects
	Manage ad-hoc commercial, technical, and contractual tasks related to the Airtel account
	Lead and coordinate as ACR for responses to RFPs on any new opportunities from other CSPs as assigned (Glo is following up for engagement with us)
	Monitor customer satisfaction and proactively address any concerns or escalations
	Represent Ericsson at customer meetings, industry forums, and business reviews


Requirements
The skills you bring:


	Bachelor's Degree in Business, Engineering, Telecommunications, or a related field
	Proven experience in account management, sales, or business development within the telecommunications or technology industry
	Strong commercial acumen with a track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	Excellent stakeholder management and relationship-building skills at senior levels
	Deep understanding of telecom products, solutions, and services — RAN, Core Network, BSS/OSS, and Managed Services is a strong advantage
	Familiarity with regulatory and compliance frameworks, including NOTAP, CCI, and LC processes in relevant markets
	Experience managing deals and pipelines through Salesforce or similar CRM platforms
	Strong negotiation, influencing, and presentation skills
	Collaborative mindset with the ability to coordinate and lead cross-functional teams
	Self-driven, results-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, matrix organization


Why join Ericsson?


	At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems.
	You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant",
  "description": "Natafamdavid Consulting Nigeria Limited is a business growth consultancy company offering tailor made services targeted at building profitable and productive companies with a focus on building sustainable enterprises, comprehensive HR advisory services, brand growth, corporate governance, business strategy and advisory services at different sections of the value chain.

Our services are across-the-board and we are driven by a strong passion to create value for our clients. From the het go, we set out to work with clients across diverse industries, providing strategic solutions to increase our success matrix, productivity, profitability.

So far, we have worked with clients in different industries and sectors such as Agriculture, Real Estate, Hospitality, Engineering &amp; Construction, Education, Logistics, Health &amp; Environment, Oil &amp; gas, Retail and more, to achieve their itemized objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Manage schedules, appointments, and meetings for the executive
	Prepare correspondence, reports, and official documents
	Handle phone calls, emails, and other communications professionally
	Organize travel arrangements and itineraries
	Maintain confidential files and records
	Take meeting minutes and follow up on action points
	Coordinate office activities and support daily operations
	Liaise with internal and external stakeholders on behalf of management
	Perform other administrative duties as assigned


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / B.Sc. in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, or related field
	Proven experience as a Personal Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Administrative Officer
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and work under pressure
	Professional appearance and good etiquette


Preferred Skills:


	Strong attention to detail
	Ability to multitask effectively
	Problem-solving and decision-making skills
	Good knowledge of office procedures


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;nadrecruitmentng@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Personal Assistant Job at Natafamdavid Consulting Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Natafamdavid Consulting Nigeria Limited is a business growth consultancy company offering tailor made services targeted at building profitable and productive companies with a focus on building sustainable enterprises, comprehensive HR advisory services, brand growth, corporate governance, business strategy and advisory services at different sections of the value chain.

Our services are across-the-board and we are driven by a strong passion to create value for our clients. From the het go, we set out to work with clients across diverse industries, providing strategic solutions to increase our success matrix, productivity, profitability.

So far, we have worked with clients in different industries and sectors such as Agriculture, Real Estate, Hospitality, Engineering & Construction, Education, Logistics, Health & Environment, Oil & gas, Retail and more, to achieve their itemized objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Manage schedules, appointments, and meetings for the executive
	Prepare correspondence, reports, and official documents
	Handle phone calls, emails, and other communications professionally
	Organize travel arrangements and itineraries
	Maintain confidential files and records
	Take meeting minutes and follow up on action points
	Coordinate office activities and support daily operations
	Liaise with internal and external stakeholders on behalf of management
	Perform other administrative duties as assigned


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / B.Sc. in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, or related field
	Proven experience as a Personal Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Administrative Officer
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and work under pressure
	Professional appearance and good etiquette


Preferred Skills:


	Strong attention to detail
